UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores the user's family association and role.

familyId.description: The ID of the family this user belongs to.

role.description: The role of the user in the family.

JoinCode.title: Join Code
JoinCode.description: A code used to join a family.

KidProgress.title: Kid Progress
KidProgress.description: Stores the progress of a kid's morning routine.

stars.description: The total number of stars the kid has earned.

lastStarDate.description: The date string of the last time a star was awarded.

lastActiveDate.description: The date string of the last time the kid was active (used for daily resets).

completedTasks.description: The list of task IDs currently completed.

/users/{userId}.description: The user's profile containing their family association.

/joinCodes/{code}.description: Codes used to join a family.

/users/{userId}/kids/{kidId}.description: The progress for each kid, scoped to the parent's user ID.
